from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd

# 首先找到两家公司的ID
query = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name LIKE '%太行%' OR name LIKE '%Leting%' OR name LIKE '%莱特%'
""")
companies = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("找到的公司:")
print(companies)

# 搜索更多可能的公司名称变体
query = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name LIKE '%鹤岗%' OR name LIKE '%莱特%' OR name LIKE '%Leting%' OR name LIKE '%Leting%'
""")
companies = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("找到的公司:")
print(companies)

# 搜索更多可能的公司名称变体
query = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name LIKE '%鹤岗%' OR name LIKE '%莱特%' OR name LIKE '%Leting%'
""")
companies = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("找到的公司:")
print(companies)

# 同时搜索所有钢铁行业的公司，看看是否有匹配
query2 = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE industry_type = 'STEEL'
LIMIT 20
""")
steel_companies = pd.read_sql(query2, engine)
print("\n钢铁行业公司:")
print(steel_companies)

# 搜索所有公司名称，看看是否有"莱特"或"Leting"相关的公司
query = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name LIKE '%莱特%' OR name LIKE '%莱特%' OR name LIKE '%Leting%' OR name LIKE '%莱特%' OR name LIKE '%莱特%'
""")
companies = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("找到的公司:")
print(companies)

# 搜索所有公司，看看是否有"鹤岗"相关的
query2 = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name LIKE '%鹤岗%'
""")
companies2 = pd.read_sql(query2, engine)
print("\n鹤岗相关公司:")
print(companies2)
